title: Villager Warship
description: Adds a big villager warship to the oceans
body:
**This mod adds a Giant Villager Warship to the oceans, packed with villager and valuable goods.**
![Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ffeaa7237364e94a80fecfb49d7411d962800b5.jpeg)

- Spawns: The ship appears in all Ocean biomes.
- Villager Crew: The warship is manned by villagers of all professions, along with iron golems who protect the treasure onboard.
  
![Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd588e9594e95691310b91379744df0bdb3c9463.jpeg)

- The ship holds many secrets to discover and features a beautifully decorated interior.

![Golem room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e267ce75f40c0d2696763e9d84d53fd0aa464be5.jpeg)

![Side view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b358c5fc06c0cdbbee93da1838b4d489d3e540d.jpeg)



Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
